name: [WIP] Terrain Shadow Removal
author: automata-rtx
description: Removes the animated ground-shadow overlay that Twilight Princess bakes into the terrain material itself (the slowly swaying dappled shade on forest/field floors, e.g. Faron) - a different system from the 'moya' particle shadows. It washes the overlay out by pinning its TEV wash register to maximum (the same value maximum fog density produces) on the cloud-shadow terrain materials (MA00/MA01/MA04/MA16) after the game sets it, so only the shadow stage stops darkening and the base ground is left fully intact - no holes. Per-material-code toggles plus a live logger let you keep the overlay in areas you want it. The big rolling Hyrule-Field cloud shadows are the separate moya system and are not touched here. EXPERIMENTAL and off by default.
